metadata.description: Project- and stack-agnostic Spec-Driven Development kit for Claude Code: an OpenSpec feature-lifecycle dynamic workflow (route -> clarify -> validated spec -> human approval gate -> implement -> validate -> forced-greptile review -> signed PR), the sdd-openspec enforcer agent, SDD gate hooks, and a CLI installer that wires up engram (persistent memory), caveman (compressed subagents), and chrome-devtools-mcp (browser automation).

plugins.name: sdd-harness
plugins.description: The agnostic SDD/OpenSpec harness: sdd-feature-flow dynamic workflow + sdd-clarify front-door + sdd-openspec agent + pre-pr-greptile skill + SDD gate hooks. Requires the caveman plugin; pairs with engram.
